name: AdGen Video Architecture — Remotion + Editly Integration
spec: Video ad creation and editing integrated into AdGen pipeline

criteria.statement: Remotion project scaffolded in workspace/video/ with package.json and tsconfig
theme.ts loaded with Telnyx brand tokens (PP Formula, Inter, brand colors)
PP Formula and Inter font files in video/public/fonts/
At least 4 Remotion composition templates exist (ProductLaunch, SocialAd, StatReveal, FeatureDemo)
Each composition accepts props for headline, subhead, CTA, hero image, accent color
Compositions render at 1920x1080, 1080x1080, and 1080x1920 aspect ratios
scripts/render_video.py orchestrates Remotion render via CLI subprocess
render_video.py accepts JSON stdin with brief, template, format, duration
render_video.py outputs MP4 to workspace/output/ directory
scripts/edit_video.py wraps editly for clip assembly from JSON spec
edit_video.py supports cut, trim, splice, overlay, and title card operations
pipeline.py updated with output_type parameter: 'static' (Abyssale), 'video' (Remotion), 'edit' (Editly)
DALL-E/Gemini hero images usable as Remotion composition backgrounds
Video output gets metadata sidecar JSON same as static assets
SOUL.md documents when to use static vs video vs edit output
TOOLS.md documents render_video.py and edit_video.py usage
Remotion dependencies installable via npm install in video/ directory
editly installed globally or locally and callable from edit_video.py
E2E test: brief → Remotion render → MP4 output posted to Slack
Video renders complete in under 60 seconds for a 15-second ad
